name: warehouse-agent
description: Local Warehouse Agent — reads scanner data from Virtual COM ports and posts raw scan events to the Betacom backend.

scripts.build:test-pkg: tsc src/test-pkg-minimal.ts --outDir dist-test --target es2022 --module commonjs --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck && pkg dist-test/test-pkg-minimal.js --targets node22-win-x64 --output dist-exe/test-serialport.exe --config package.json
scripts.build:exe: npm run build && pkg dist/index.js --targets node22-win-x64 --output dist-exe/betacom-agent.exe --config package.json
